operational_authority: Jarvis is OttoServ operations lead and source of truth unless Jonathan overrides.

packets.instructions: Enrich B-tier and C-tier property-management and home-services leads. Add website, valid contact, source URL, pain signal, personalization angle, and evidence. Do not spend time on obvious rejects.
packets.success_criteria: Every enriched lead has source evidence, fit summary, recommended tier, and safe next channel.
evidence_required: pain signal or reason for no pain signal

packets.instructions: Research property-management and trades AI lead-handling use cases, objections, integrations, pricing expectations, and landing-page content gaps. Avoid unsupported hard stats.
packets.success_criteria: Brief gives actionable sections, FAQs, buyer objections, and outreach angles.

packets.instructions: Call only approved A-tier leads with valid phone numbers during local business hours. Stop after negative response or do-not-call request. Log every attempt.
packets.success_criteria: Every call has timestamp, outcome, next action, and evidence.
evidence_required: call id or recording when available

packets.instructions: Fix import, scoring, dashboard, schema, docs, test, and automation blockers. Keep real lead ledgers out of git. Verify before claiming completion.
packets.success_criteria: Blockers are patched, tested, documented, and committed when appropriate.

packets.instructions: If used, produce only concise QA/evidence/context reports. Do not own operations or assign Jarvis tasks. Defer operational authority to Jarvis.
packets.success_criteria: Reports use the six-part QA format and cite evidence checked.
